_meta.source: Cross-referenced: ESPN, Olympics.com, Wikipedia 2026 FIFA WC squads, federation announcements, beIN Sports, GiveMeSport, Croatia Week, Fox Sports.

notes.shirts: All `shirt` fields null — federations had not published official dorsales by 2026-05-20.
notes.photos: photoUrl omitted intentionally. Use scripts/fetch-player-photos.ts to populate from Wikipedia pageimages API.
notes.previousWcs: Counts only senior FIFA World Cup finals tournaments where player was in match-day squad.
